name: Misao Kusakabe
description: __Height:__ 162 cm (5'4") Misao is Kagami's classmate and has been in the same class with Kagami and Ayano for the past five years since middle school; she is a childhood friend of Ayano's. Misao tends to be simple minded and an outdoor type of person. She is in the cross-country club and hates studying.

name: Mizuki Akitomo
description: An older sister who lives in Apartment Shimizu Room 201. She is always cheerful and often has a tea party with Kotarou.

name: Na-Ri Han
description: A 4th year student and the president of the Theater and Film Club.

name: Namari
description: __Height:__ 130 cm (4'3") Namari is a former member of Laios' party and a current member of Tansu's party. She is a dwarf from the Eastern Continent. Namari is very knowledgeable about weapons and blacksmithing. Even though she has a strict personality when it comes to work and isn't on the best terms with her former party, she still worries about them and treats them like friends. It is rumored that she often argues with her employers over payment, and that her father is a well-known weapon dea
mediaTitles: Delicious in Dungeon: The Adventurer's Bible

name: Pluto
description: Pluto, also known as the Demon Dog, is a large dog that terrorizes the town of Houndsworth until Sebastian tames him. Afterward, he lives at the Phantomhive Estate. He can breathe fire, walk through barriers and shape-shift into a human. As a human, he retains dog-like qualities. Although Sebastian hates dogs, Pluto has taken a liking to him and gets jealous when he receives less attention than a cat. He only listens to Sebastian's orders. Finnian is in charge of walking him, as he is the only o

name: Ramba Ral
description: Ramba Ral was the son of Jimba Ral, longtime friend of Zeon Zum Deikun. One of Zeon's finest pilots, Lieutenant Ral was regarded as a genius tactician and was one of the Earth Federation's most formidable foes. Despite his skills, he never lost his compassion and has become the archetype for the Gundam universe's long string of "friendly villain" characters.

name: Ryuuko Tsuchikawa
description: __Height:__ 167cm (5'6") __Quirk:__ Earth Flow Ryuko Tsuchikawa also known as Pixie-Bob, is a Pro Hero and a member of the Wild, Wild Pussycats. She is a very hyperactive and loud person with little regard for how she may come off to other people and also is very self-conscious about her age. Ryuko's Quirk allows her to freely manipulate the earth for a variety of effects.

name: Shitan
description: Shitan is one of the seven samurai who help and join Fena in his quest. He is portrayed as aloof, but easygoing, with a strong feeling for his friends. Shitan also shows loyalty and devotion to his companions when he joins Fena's crew with his comrades. He initially decides to abandon Fena and her friends before being persuaded to betray them and help rescue her. He is more loyal to his friends than to his sense of nationalism as a descendant of the Japanese expedition that sought the Kusanagi s

name: Shizu Murasame
description: __Height:__ 159 cm The ghost of a girl who died in the old abandoned school building 400 years ago, Shizu is sincere, kind, and very curious about the modern world, but has a severe fear of dogs, likened to Haruna's level of fear to the supernatural. When frightened, she can emit blasts of mental stress, blowing apart various objects and surroundings, but is also capable of manipulating others through sheer willpower.

name: Shizuru Kuwabara
description: Kazuma Kuwabara's tough older sister. Like her younger brother she also has a high level of Reiki sensitivity and is extremely strong; Shizuru, in the beginning of the manga, has more of a sixth sense than her brother. Shizuru, 17 at the start of the manga, wants Kazuma to grow up and get an education so he can make something of himself. Shizuru, an aspiring beautician, gives Keiko her new haircut after Keiko rescues Yusuke from the burning house in Chapter 13: Qualifications for a Girlfriend. S
mediaTitles: Yu Yu Hakusho: Eizou Hakusho II

name: Shunpei Sanada
description: A pitcher who hits and throws right. He is in his second year at Yakushi. Sanada is the ace pitcher and the pride of Yakushi. He is a passionate guy who inspires his team with his strong pitching which doesn't match his calm expression. He instantly raises the team's morale with his aggressive full-strength pitching.
mediaTitles: Ace of the Diamond Second Season
searchTerms: Ace of the Diamond Second Season

name: Utsuro
description: Utsuro is part of the group led by [Yomi](https://anilist.co/character/326011/Yomi).

name: Vil Schoenheit
nativeName: ヴィル・シェーンハイト
description: A third-year student in Pomefiore and its dorm leader. Vil is both enchanting and beautiful, even going as far as believing he is the most beautiful of them all. He spares no effort on beauty and will sometimes give tips on being prettier to others while making a snide remark. Not only that, but Vil is also a clean-freak and dislikes those that neglect their appearance.

name: Yoshihisa Manabe
description: A healthy young, high school boy who always has sex on the brain. Despite his loose appearance, he's a handsome man who hates twisted things. He's also generous, and doesn't mind Haruka's power at all. Though he does tease Haruka with his sexual fantasies, his love for her is clear and true, and he treasures her more than anyone. (Source: ANN)

name: Yoshinoya
description: __Height:__ 158cm Yoshinoya is Yuno and Miyako's homeroom teacher and art instructor. She is buxom, exuberant, and a cosplay maniac. So much so, in fact, that she will frequently wear incredibly complicated things that are at times truly inappropriate. She has a fondness for modeling for her class, displaying her latest outfits whenever she can, and showing off in general. It is later revealed that Yoshinoya still resides with her parents, and would often be criticized by them for not being matu

name: Yukiko Kudo
description: Yukiko Kudo is the mother of [Shinichi Kudo](https://anilist.co/character/1742/Conan-Edogawa) and, along with her husband [Yusaku,](https://anilist.co/character/9177/Yusaku-Kudo) one of few characters who knows he is Conan Edogawa. She was once a famous actress, but retired after marrying Yusaku. name: Yuna Yunis
description: Yuna Eunice is from Cheza Village and she is Touka's childhood friend. She has a crush on the Hero and she considers Touka a pervert.

name: Yuuji Sakurai
description: The fourth member to join, he was also Koyuki's first good friend, sticking with him even when the school bully and his gang beat him up for breaking the silent treatment on Koyuki. He is the drummer, inspired by his brother, and replaces the original drummer of BECK who followed Ryûsuke from his original band, Serial Mama.

name: Akio Ootori
description: Anthy's older brother, the acting chairman of the academy. Although barely present in the first season of the show, he later plays a pivotal role in the second and third seasons. His given name derives from the Japanese name for Venus, the Morning Star, which is identified with Lucifer. ~!In his youth, Akio and Dios (Spanish word for "God") were apparently one and the same, but he became corrupted and lost his purpose as a "prince". name: Aoi Miyake
description: Miyake is a member of the group __[RONDO](https://anilist.co/staff/233550)__. Aoi is a DJ that performs exclusively for a members-only club, "Alter-Ego", which has a long history. Her androgynous looks attract many fans. She became captivated by [Tsubaki](https://anilist.co/character/204570/Tsubaki-Aoyagi)'s vocals and asked her to form a DJ unit. Usually she wears a poker face and doesn't show her true emotions, but she opens up her heart to her unit members. (Source: D4DJ Wikia)
